description: Adds or updates a markdown panel on the workbench canvas. Use this for narrative findings, checklists, tables, or formatted explanations alongside charts and live queries. The `identifier` is stable across calls: reuse it to replace the same block. `layout` is required so the block has a defined position and size on the grid.

identifier.description: Unique key for this canvas block (e.g. `summary`, `root_cause`, `timeline`). Must be unique among canvas blocks in this job.

markdown.description: GitHub-flavored markdown body shown in the block. Prefer headings, bullet lists, and short sections so the canvas stays scannable.

layout.description: Required grid placement for this block (CanvasBlock.Layout). All of x, y, w, and h must be set.

x.description: Column index of the top-left cell (0-based).

y.description: Row index of the top-left cell (0-based).
